title: You're Invited - Zoom Party | #shorts
full_text: If you pre-ordered my book before April 28th, you are invited to a Zoom party where I am going to answer every question you've ever had about my book because we're selling so many thousands of copies. We're going to have multiple Zoom events where I will answer your questions one-on-one. Bring your book clubs, bring your girl gangs, bring your kitty clubs, bring everybody and ask whatever is on your mind. I promise to be honest and truthful. And I promise that by the time that Zoom is done, you're going to believe you can do anything because that's what this book is about. It's about transforming your life and making you know and making you believe that anything is possible and it's never too late.
